title: Bitcoin slide to $70,000 as stocks pause and Strategy's BTC sale weighs on crypto
Strategy sold bitcoin in late May, and told the market in June. Here's how Polymarket bettors are fighting over when it counts.
TON jumps 15% as The Open Network plans rebrand to Gram
summary: Telegram founder Pavel Durov says it is “returning to our roots — and starting a new chapter” by rebranding Toncoin to Gram.

title: Bitmine buys $52M ETH as Tom Lee says price not yet showing Ethereum’s strength
summary: Bitmine is aiming to hold 5% of the total circulating supply of 120.6 million Ether tokens and is about 90% of the way to its target after its latest purchase.

title: State Street Head Trader Says Won May Rebound in Second Half
summary: The South Korean won could rebound in the second half of the year as foreign selling of local equities eases and persistent current-account surpluses support the currency, according to a State Street Bank and Trust Co. trader with more than 25 years at the firm.

title: Oil Edges Down After Biggest Gain in a Month on US-Iran Standoff
summary: Oil ticked lower after its biggest gain in about a month, as uncertainty about the state of US-Iran peace talks raised the risk that energy flows from the Persian Gulf could be curtailed for longer.
